queue_item.action: Compose GitHub OIDC cryptographic verification and run-binding authorization into one fail-closed entrypoint.
required_evidence: explicit trust limits and falsification route

progress.finding: Authorization over decoded claims is unsafe unless signature verification succeeds first; the composed result must suppress claims on either signature or authorization failure.
progress.verification: 3 exact composed-chain tests committed; 5 functionally equivalent cryptographic-core tests passed locally. Exact committed chain execution remains pending.

queue_item.handoff: Cloudflare and Vercel deployment evidence workflows should call verifyAndAuthorizeGitHubOidcRun as the sole claim-release boundary. They must still implement trusted discovery/JWKS retrieval, cache and rotation policy, replay rejection, and live-token evidence.

canonical_queue_update_policy: Add this record to ACTIVE_QUEUE.json in a conflict-aware aggregation step; do not overwrite records owned by other teams.
